title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: 1. **High**: `smoke-happy-login.js` can leave production state dirty if setup fails before the `try/finally` block starts. `runD1(setupSql)` executes before `try`, so partial user/token mutations may persist without cleanup on pre-`try` failure. [smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:232) [smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:235) 2. **Medium**: both endpoint clients parse `updatedAt` but never use it; startup/shared sync can overwrite a fresher in-memory token with stale localStorage token. [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/public/happy/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:71) [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/public/happy/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:138) [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/public/happy/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:205) [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:71) [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:138) [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:205) 3. **Medium**: fallback refresh lock is TTL-based (10s) and not renewed; on browsers without `navigator.locks`, slow refresh calls can allow a second tab to acquire lock and trigger duplicate refresh attempts. [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/public/happy/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:13) [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/public/happy/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:169) [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/public/happy/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:197) [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:13) [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:169) [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:197) 4. **Low (test gap)**: test coverage exercises `navigator.locks` path, but not the no-lock fallback path or stale-token overwrite behavior. [test-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-endpoint-client.js:179)
